Name: Weaponmastery
Effect: +3 Combat Skill with mastered melee weapons; +3 to random-number picks when using Bow.

Name: Animal Control
Effect: Narrative discipline for communicating with animals and fighting effectively from the saddle.

Name: Curing
Effect: Recover 1 END for each numbered section without combat, up to max; also identifies herbs and cures specific conditions.

Name: Invisibility
Effect: Narrative discipline for concealment, blending in, and social disguise.

Name: Huntmastery
Effect: No Meal is needed when instructed to eat, including wasteland or desert; also ignores surprise and ambush Combat Skill penalties.

Name: Pathsmanship
Effect: Narrative discipline for paths, foreign writing, traps, and orientation.

Name: Psi-surge
Effect: +4 Combat Skill and -2 END per combat round; cannot be used at 6 END or lower.

Name: Psi-screen
Effect: Prevents END loss from Mindforce attacks and strengthens resistance to illusions and hypnosis.

Name: Nexus
Effect: Prevents END loss from extremes of heat and cold and supports certain telekinetic story effects.

Name: Divination
Effect: Narrative discipline for sensing hidden danger, true purpose, or psychic presence.
